texts.ask_location_normal: 📍 Please share your location and I’ll find nearby toilets for you
texts.ask_location_ai: 📍 Please share your location and I’ll use AI to recommend nearby toilets
texts.confirm_delete: ⚠️ Are you sure you want to remove {name} from favorites?
texts.busy_try_later: System is busy. Please try again later 🙏
texts.lang_switch_fail: ❌ Failed to switch language. Please try again later.
texts.ai_review_quota_limit: (You have reached today's AI usage review limit. Please come back tomorrow for a new analysis 🙏)

literals.目前還沒有足夠的使用紀錄可以產生 AI 使用回顧喔～\n可以多多使用「附近廁所」:
Not enough usage data yet to generate an AI usage summary.
Try using Nearby Toilets, Status Report, Add Toilet, and Favorites more often.
I’ll prepare a personalized report for you soon 🙌
literals.📌 使用說明：\n・點「附近廁所」或直接傳位置\n・可加入最愛、回饋、看 AI:
📌 Help:
• Tap 'Nearby Toilets' or send location
• Add favorites, leave feedback, view AI summary
• You can also switch to AI recommendation mode
literals.今天 AI 推薦附近廁所的次數已達每日上限喔～\n如果還需要查詢，建議先切換回一:
You have reached today's AI nearby recommendation limit.
Please switch back to normal mode to continue 👍
literals.🔁 小提醒：可以輸入「附近廁所」或傳送位置，我會幫你找最近的廁所 🚽: 🔁 Tip: Type 'Nearby toilets' or share your location to find toilets 🚽
literals.（今日 AI 使用回顧次數已達上限，明天再來看看新的分析吧 🙏）: (You have reached today's AI usage review limit. Please come back tomorrow for a new analysis 🙏)
literals.今天 AI 摘要查詢次數已達上限，明天再來看看最新的分析吧 🙏: You’ve reached today’s AI summary limit. Please try again tomorrow 🙏
literals.✅ 已切換回一般模式，請點『發送我的位置』我會幫你找最近的廁所: ✅ Switched to normal mode. Please share your location to find nearby toilets.
literals.現在查詢人數有點多，我排一下隊；你可再傳一次位置或稍候幾秒～: Too many requests now. Please send your location again or try in a few seconds.
literals.📍 請傳送你現在的位置，我會用 AI 幫你挑附近最適合的廁所: 📍 Please share your location. I will use AI to pick the best nearby toilets.
literals.我沒有看懂你的指令 🙏\n你可以試試：附近廁所 / 使用說明:
I didn’t understand 🙏
Try: Nearby Toilets / Help
literals.⚠️ 確定要刪除 {name} 嗎？（目前刪除為移除最愛）: ⚠️ Are you sure you want to remove {name} from favorites?
literals.📍 請傳送你的位置，我會用 AI 幫你挑附近最適合的廁所: 📍 Please share your location. I will use AI to pick the best nearby toilets.
literals.📍 請點『傳送我的位置』，我會用 AI 幫你挑附近的廁所: 📍 Please share your location and I’ll use AI to recommend nearby toilets
literals.🏅 還沒解鎖徽章，試著多回報幾次狀態就會慢慢解鎖囉！: 🏅 No badges unlocked yet. Try reporting more status updates!
literals.📍 請點下方『發送我的位置』，我會幫你找最近的廁所: 📍 Please share your location and I will find nearby toilets for you
literals.Google 試算表已達儲存上限，改為暫存本機。: Google Sheets storage limit reached. Falling back to local temporary storage.
literals.📍 請點下方『傳送我的位置』，我立刻幫你找廁所: 📍 Please share your location and I’ll find nearby toilets for you
literals.🤖 查看 AI 為你生成的個人化使用分析：: 🤖 View your AI-generated personal usage summary:
literals.📍 請點『傳送我的位置』，我立刻幫你找廁所: 📍 Please share your location and I’ll find nearby toilets for you
literals.附近沒有廁所 😥 要不要補上一間？: No toilets nearby 😥 Want to add one?
literals.想用 AI 再分析其他位置嗎？: Want AI to analyze another location?
literals.❌ 切換語言失敗，請稍後再試: ❌ Failed to switch language. Please try again later.
literals.回饋表尚未就緒，請稍後再試: Feedback sheet not ready, please try again later
literals.AI 發生錯誤，請稍後再試: AI error, please try again later
literals.系統忙線中，請稍後再試 🙏: System is busy. Please try again later 🙏
literals.❌ 系統錯誤，請稍後再試: ❌ System error. Please try again later.
literals.你還沒有新增過廁所喔。: You haven't added any toilets yet.
